503CustomIZ5-2教程:
<size=18><color=#FFAF60>Mọi Con Đường Đều Đến Mái Nhà 5-2 Tutorial: Garlic Lane-Switching</color>
<size=12><alpha=#03>Giải Pháp Tối Ưu: Còn 700 mặt trời
<size=330><alpha=#00>
<size=16><alpha=#FF>Most plants with <color=#FFFFDF>Garlic</color> in their recipes force zombies to switch lanes when bitten.
Normally, zombies will randomly move up or down, but in some cases, they only move in a fixed direction:
<size=3>
<size=16>1. If the zombie is on an edge lane: it will only move inward;
2. If the zombie bites a <color=#FFFFDF>Garlicr Pot</color> or a Garlic-based plant on it: it will only move towards the middle (except already in the middle).
<size=0>
<size=16>To avoid randomness, only these two lane-switching mechanics will appear in later levels.
<size=360>
